title: Opening for Production Engineer at Wavin India

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Wavin India
jsonLd.description:
Wavin India has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Mysuru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Wavin India:
Wavin India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wavin India!
